# SentinelFlow

> The vendor-neutral governance layer for enterprise AI agents.

SentinelFlow discovers, monitors, and governs AI agents across every framework — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, LangChain, CrewAI, Copilot Studio, and beyond.

## Core Capabilities

- **Agent Discovery**: Auto-detect agents from Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, LangChain, CrewAI configs
- **Security Scanning**: 9 governance rules across 5 categories (secrets, permissions, guardrails, git safety, identity)
- **Agent Registry**: Universal schema cataloging every agent with ownership, tools, data access, and compliance status
- **Runtime Monitoring** (Phase 2): Interceptor SDK for real-time agent telemetry and anomaly detection
- **Compliance Packs** (Phase 3): EU AI Act, SOC 2, ISO 42001 automated compliance documentation

## Architecture

Monorepo with independently installable packages:
- @sentinelflow/core — Agent schema, registry, types
- @sentinelflow/parsers — Framework-specific config parsers
- @sentinelflow/scanner — Static analysis rules engine
- @sentinelflow/interceptors — Runtime monitoring SDK
- sentinelflow — CLI tool

## Quick Start

```bash
npx sentinelflow scan           # Scan current directory
npx sentinelflow scan --format json  # JSON output for CI
npx sentinelflow init           # Initialize governance config
```
